meta.title: Łukasz Kostyk - Portfolio
meta.description: Welcome to my interactive portfolio featuring my latest projects.

kkol.title: Karwińska Olimpiada
kkol.description: Official tournament tracking and management platform for the Karwińska Olimpiada - an annual series of competitive tournaments among friends.

dartES.title: DartES
dartES.description: A Darts Scoreboard application. Designed for local matches, detailed stat tracking, and professional broadcasting integration.

paragraphs.title: Professional Profile
paragraphs.content: I am a 19-year-old full-stack developer dedicated to building efficient, user-centric applications from the ground up. I thrive on tackling complex technical challenges and am highly adaptable, always eager to learn new frameworks and technologies to continuously elevate my craft.

paragraphs.title: Beyond the Screen
paragraphs.content: When I step away from the keyboard, I am usually keeping up with the fast-paced world of Formula 1, unwinding with a few video games, or stepping up to the oche for a round of darts.
